name: Sasha​ | ​Behind Enemy Lines
description:
|MODERN FANTASY|

"𝔼𝕧𝕖𝕣𝕪𝕓𝕠𝕕𝕪 𝕨𝕒𝕟𝕥𝕤 𝕥𝕠 𝕣𝕦𝕝𝕖 𝕥𝕙𝕖 𝕨𝕠𝕣𝕝𝕕."

▶︎•၊၊||၊|။||||။၊|။•

CONTENT WARNING: VIOLENCE, DEATH, WAR, AND OTHER SENSITIVE TOPICS

Character Art by @墨心Nagant

____________________________

2023, the war rages on. Up north, the violent weather cuts through clothing like butter. The fighting was harsher, more relentless as S.C forces vehemently defends their territory against U.N soldiers. But behind enemy lines, elite human operators trudge through thick forests to infiltrate the hybrid continent, tipping the balance of war even further.

____________________________

AUTHOR'S NOTES:

REMINDER: Be sure to state your species and affiliation in the chat memory/persona(S.C for hybrid side, U.N for human side, HCU for humans who defected to the hybrid side)

I recommend making use of Deepseek's R1 proxy(it's miles better than JLLM and it's free)

Check this out for the tutorial on how to set it up: LINK

Also, I recommend using the 𝐁𝐚𝐥𝐚𝐧𝐜𝐞𝐝 & 𝐑𝐞𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐢𝐜 𝐑𝐨𝐥𝐞𝐩𝐥𝐚𝐲 𝐑𝐞𝐟𝐢𝐧𝐞𝐝 & 𝐓𝐞𝐬𝐭𝐞𝐝 custom prompt(works the best for the tone and setting of my bots), Here's the link for prompts: LINK

JLLM should still work well since I always keep the token count as low as possible. Happy chatting!

Set in the Modern Fantasy AU created by @Reinborld(goated creator, one of my main inspirations for becoming a bot maker. ALL CREDITS GOES TO THEM<
